name: Persimmon Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut persimmons into quarters, almost to the stem end, and spread apart.
2. Place on a bed of lettuce.
3. Combine pears, grapes, and pineapple and mound within the persimmons.
4. Sprinkle each piece with 1 teaspoon of pine nuts and 1 teaspoon of walnuts.
5. Serve with mayonnaise.
